tasks.label: Forecasting
tasks.description: Forecast held-out future values and evaluate errors.

tasks.label: Classification
tasks.description: Train a time-series classifier and evaluate test labels.

tasks.label: Anomaly Detection
tasks.description: Detect point anomalies and compare with known labels.
